title: BaytsAlertsRecipe
description:
Bayesian Time Series Alerts. Per-pixel S1 SAR disturbance alerts vs a `BAYTS_HISTORICAL` reference distribution. Outputs alert pixels with confidence scores.

Pipeline: load `reference` (BAYTS_HISTORICAL recipe/asset) → pull recent S1 covering monitoring window ending at `date.monitoringEnd`, going back `date.monitoringDuration` → Bayesian posterior for change → alerts above threshold.

**LLM must set:** `reference.{type, id}` (which BAYTS_HISTORICAL — no default; user must build one first). `date.monitoringEnd` defaults to today.

options.title: BaytsAlertsOptions
options.description: S1 processing. Same shape + conditionals as `BAYTS_HISTORICAL.options` — typically copied verbatim from the reference.

reference.title: BaytsAlertsReference
reference.description: SEPAL BAYTS_HISTORICAL recipe or EE asset id of an exported one. User must run BAYTS_HISTORICAL first.

monitoringEnd.description: Exclusive end of monitoring. Default = today.

monitoringDurationUnit.description: Unit. (Backend also accepts `years`, but GUI doesn't expose it.)

wetlandMaskAsset.description: Wetland mask EE asset id. Default `users/wiell/SepalResources/wetlandMask_v1`. Empty string = disable.

normalization.description: Normalize per-orbit means to historical reference.

maxDays.description: Max days to wait for confirmation obs. Default 90.

highConfidenceThreshold.description: Posterior threshold for HIGH alerts. Default 0.975.

lowConfidenceThreshold.description: Posterior threshold for LOW alerts. Default 0.85.

minNonForestProbability.description: Min non-forest posterior to flag pixel disturbed. Default 0.6.
